name: Kamona's Former Colonel
description:
Trapped in the Armory and got to a shootout with the Colonel Renoir? Can you pierce through his armor and take him down?

Renoir is a former Colonel of the Northern Front Army and Brigade Commander of the No. 4 Armored Infantry Brigade. He was integrated into the 138th Division of the 2nd Corps during the North-South War, and led his department in organizing a counterattack against Marlos, and repelling the Southern Front. He broke away from the northern front because he felt betrayed, Renoir also invited his loyal subordinate, Ajax Jones to defect from the northern front.
creator: Lunchy51
